creator: george@nycbug.org
text:
The blog post at https://blog.torproject.org/blog/tor-0275-released-and-stable is entitled "Tor 0.2.7.5 is released and stable," so formally it *is* stable.

And OpenBSD moved their net/tor port to 0.2.7.5 and they do not allow dev or alpha versions in their ports tree.

OTOH, the 0.2.7.x branch requires a new version of OpenSSL than is on the 9.x FreeBSD branch, and there is no new 'alpha' branch from the Tor Project yet, so for port categorization purposes, it makes sense to keep security/tor at 0.2.6.x and security/tor-devel at 0.2.7.x IMHO.
